long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between cbs02.tl01.nyc01 ae0 <-> cbs01.eq01.chi01 ae0. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19945
